programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Live: MLB Now
programme.desc: The hourlong weekday afternoon "MLB Now" presents the day's top stories in baseball by spanning the sport's cultural divide. programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit two hotels that have utilized their desert location in the United Arab Emirates to offer guests unique stays found in a few places in the world.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the vast continent of the USA. From the hustle and bustle of the east to the relaxed, atmospheric west, two contrasting hotels offer an American adventure with a difference.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two completely different parts of the African continent, both offering guests a unique and contrasting flavour of Africa.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode we're in the nation's capital of India - New Delhi and in 'The City of lakes' Udaipur at two Oberoi hotels where the standard of service takes hotel hospitality to a whole new level.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Vietnam - a country known for its tropical landscapes, exotic Asian cuisine, and vibrant culture is enjoying a new surge in popularity as a go-to travel destination. And at the forefront of this booming tourism scene are two incredible hotels!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred and his former boss, Chef Michel Roux Jr. are in Paris experiencing the signature dish of a classic restaurant and enjoying the simple pleasures of a perfect ham baguette.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restauranteur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating cafe on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Tom Kerridge takes Fred to Edinburgh to enjoy stunning local produce at one of the City's most famous fine dining restaurants and to sample Scotland's best fish and chips.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix is heading to Bristol for a winter treat in the company of Michel Roux Junior. Michel can't wait to show Fred his favourites, from the perfect French bistro to a festive countryside escape and Jamaican jerk turkey.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzanova on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Pamela tells her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon; Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda's 62-year-old mother.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A workaholic mother is losing her grasp on her third marriage; a woman thinks a demonic force is possessing her daughter and causing her to be a lesbian; a man's brief affair with his fiancee's mother comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chyna confronts her backstabbing "friend"; Jarod says the stress of being the sole breadwinner for his family has driven him down the path of adultery; Derrick proposes to his ex-girlfriend, who is already married.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A cheater learns that his stripper fling was born male; a man divulges to his girlfriend that he is bisexual and has been unfaithful with a transsexual.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: A couple cheats on each other; a man reveals a secret to his fiancee; a man wants his husband to stop trying to be a woman; a woman plans to steal her lover from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry Springer and his outrageous guests engage in lively and often tasteless discussion, complete with bleeped profanity and chair throwing.

programme.title: Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Guests admit to sex betrayals.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Donnie's wife disappeared with his cousin for hours and refused to take his phone calls; another parent told Angelina that her boyfriend was cheating with a prostitute.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A registered sex offender and his wife, whom he began dating when she was 12, say they are happily married and have four children.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: The former Chicago cop and security guard of "The Jerry Springer Show" gets his own talk show that is adapted from the popular "Steve to the Rescue" shows he did while filling in for Springer. Wilkos says he hopes his show will provide him with a platform to stand up for everyday people and help viewers in need. Common topics include trying to confirm -- often using results of lie-detector tests -

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jessica, her boyfriend and her grandmother are each suspected of causing her young child's life-threatening injuries.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Fathers take lie-detector tests to prove whether they sexually abused their young children.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve confronts people accused of abusing children and makes them face the truth of their lie-detector results.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A man who has four children with two women is accused of neglecting his responsibility as a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: The futures of families depend on the results of paternity tests.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A man takes a lie-detector test to prove he did not molest his girlfriend's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katrina says her stepfather molested her as a child and her mother knew and did nothing about it; her sister does not know what to believe and says it is tearing the family apart.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A young woman says her 11-year-old sister's life is spiraling out of control.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe; Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: An absentee father wants a second chance to be in his 6-year-old son's life.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Elaina and her husband say her sister's fiance raped their little girl while he was a guest in their home.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Thomas and Sharette accuse each other of cheating; Heather thinks questionable marks on her boyfriend's body came from another woman.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve tries to get through to an aspiring gang member about the dangers of the lifestyle.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Thomazina accuses her daughter of trying to kill her by poisoning her with bleach; Chris blames his girlfriend's mother for his baby's death.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Newlywed Jennifer says she has caught her husband searching for teen porn daily and has been told that he sneaks underage girls into their house when she is not at home; Amanda has heard rumors that her husband is a child molester and peeping Tom.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: A man wants to find out the truth about the death of his 4-month-old daughter.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: Based on the Henry James story "The Turn of the Screw," a psychological thriller about a woman who takes a governess job for two orphans in a Victorian home. programme.desc: The tribal people in a remote African desert live a happy life, but it is all torn to pieces when a Coca-Cola bottle falls from a plane. His journey to the "end of the world" eventually has him crossing paths with a bumbling scientist (Marius Weyers) a

programme.title: The Egyptian
programme.desc: In ancient Egypt, Sinuhe (Edmund Purdom) is a would-be doctor who saves the life of a young man (Michael Wilding) suffering from a seizure. When the afflicted youth awakes, he introduces himself as the Pharaoh Akhnaton and makes Sinuhe the royal healer. programme.title: The 300 Spartans

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: Biography of controversial World War II hero General George S. Patton. The film covers his wartime activities and accomplishments, beginning with his entry into the North African campaign and ending with his removal from command after his outspoken criticism of US post-war military strategy.

programme.title: Tolkien
programme.desc: As a young student, J.R.R. Tolkien finds love, friendship and artistic inspiration among a group of fellow outcasts. Their brotherhood soon strengthens as Tolkien weathers the storm of a tumultuous courtship with Edith Bratt and the outbreak of World War I. These early life experiences later inspire the budding author to write the classic fantasy novels "The Hobbit" and "The Lord of the Rings.".

programme.title: Big George Foreman
programme.desc: From Olympic Gold medalist to World Heavyweight champion, boxer George Foreman leads a remarkable life. He finds his faith, retires and becomes a preacher. When financial hardship hits his family and church, George steps back in the ring and regains the championship at age 45, becoming the oldest heavyweight champion in boxing history.
